Today you make a polite request and a polite complaint.

Good evening. I have a reservation for two. Could I have the menu, please?
Of course. Here you are. For your main course, the chef recommends the salmon. Are you ready to order?
Yes. For a starter, the soup, and the grilled salmon for the main course, please.
Excuse me. I am afraid the salmon is undercooked. Could you bring a hot one, please?
I am so sorry about that. I will bring a fresh one right away.
Thank you. One more thing, there seems to be a problem with the bill. I think it overcharged us for wine. Could I have a refund?
Could you bring the bill, please?

Good evening, and welcome to the restaurant. My name is Daniel, and I am your waiter tonight. Let me tell you about our specials. For a starter, we have a tomato soup or a fresh green salad. For the main course, the chef recommends the grilled salmon with vegetables, or the beef with potatoes. If you have a food allergy, please let me know, and I will check with the kitchen. When you are ready, just raise your hand and I will take your order. I will bring you some water and the menu now. Please take your time, and enjoy your evening.

This is a quick voice note about the dinner last night. The restaurant was nice, but there were two small problems. First, my main course was cold, so I asked the waiter politely to bring a hot one, and he was very kind about it. Second, when the bill arrived, there was a mistake. They charged me for a bottle of wine that I did not order, so I told the waiter there seemed to be a problem with the bill. He checked it, said sorry, and removed the wine. In the end, the manager gave me a small refund. I was happy because I stayed calm and complained in a polite way.

First, Aline asks the waiter for a table for two and reads the menu. Then she makes a polite request and says, Could I have the grilled salmon, please? After that, her main course arrives cold, so she politely tells the waiter there is a problem. Next, the waiter says sorry and brings a hot dish. Finally, the bill has a mistake, so she asks for a refund and the manager corrects it.
